overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character walking through a sunny autumn Manhattan. The clip begins at a traffic accident scene with an overturned SUV and ambulance, then proceeds through downtown streets past pedestrians, yellow taxis, and urban landmarks including the Big City Bank and a subway entrance.

events.description: opens at accident scene with overturned black SUV and ambulance
Spider-Man begins walking away from the accident scene

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking away from an accident scene with an overturned vehicle and emergency services

notable_agents.action: EMT worker kneeling on the ground near the ambulance
overturned black SUV blocking the intersection

entered.detail: black SUV flipped on its side in the middle of the intersection
red emergency ambulance with lights parked near the accident
emergency medical technician in blue and white uniform
white police sedan with emergency lights
tall office building with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a traffic accident in a sunlit urban intersection. An overturned black SUV lies in the road near a red ambulance, while an EMT kneels on the pavement. Spider-Man stands briefly before walking away from the scene, passing a police car as he moves toward the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with parked vehicles and steam vents

events.description: moves away from accident scene into open street with traffic
approaches steam rising from a manhole cover in the distance

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking down the center of the street past yellow taxis and parked cars

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving slowly past Spider-Man

entered.detail: classic yellow New York taxi cab
white steam rising from a manhole cover in the street
line of parked vehicles along the curb
white commercial van with green logo parked on the street

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks down the center of a sunlit city street lined with parked cars and modern office buildings. A yellow taxi passes by on the left as he approaches a plume of steam rising from a manhole cover in the distance. The accident scene recedes behind him as he moves deeper into the downtown area.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown intersection with bank and subway entrance

events.description: crosses the intersection at a marked crosswalk
moves from street to sidewalk in front of the Big City Bank building

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crosses the intersection and walks along the sidewalk past pedestrians and the Big City Bank

notable_agents.action: businessman in a suit walking toward Spider-Man while looking at his phone

entered.detail: modern building with large glass windows and 'BIG CITY BANK' signage
green metal railings and stairs leading down to subway station
large digital billboard displaying 'DAILY BUGLE' newspaper
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses a busy intersection at the crosswalk, moving toward the 'BIG CITY BANK' building. The crowd density increases as he steps onto the sidewalk, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. He approaches a green subway entrance with the Daily Bugle sign visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined city sidewalk with subway entrance

events.description: passes the green subway entrance railings and continues down the sidewalk
enters a section with more autumn trees and foliage lining the path

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continues down the sidewalk passing the subway entrance and walking through an area with autumn trees

entered.detail: trees with yellow and orange autumn foliage lining the sidewalk
wooden benches for pedestrians along the building edge
blue newspaper box on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks past the green subway entrance and continues along a sidewalk lined with autumn trees displaying yellow and orange leaves. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in both directions. Park benches and newspaper vending machines line the path as he moves through the shaded corridor between tall buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Manhattan intersection that transitions from a chaotic accident scene into a bustling downtown pedestrian corridor. It begins at a traffic accident featuring an overturned black SUV and a red ambulance, moving away from the wreckage and a kneeling EMT as Spider-Man walks toward the open street. As the accident scene recedes, the camera follows him down the center of a road lined with office buildings, passing a yellow taxi and a plume of steam rising from a manhole. The scene then shifts toward a busy intersection and the Big City Bank building, where the crowd density increases as he moves onto the sidewalk past a green subway entrance and a Daily Bugle sign. Finally, the path opens into a shaded urban walkway lined with autumn trees in shades of yellow and orange, passing park benches and newspaper machines amidst a flow of pedestrians.
